headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Southern (SO) Analyst Upgrades And A Key Leadership Appointment
summary: In recent days, Southern has drawn increased attention as Mississippi Power appointed Fredie Carmichael vice president of Customer Solutions and Corporate Communications, while several major research firms upgraded Southern’s rating. Together, these developments highlight growing external confidence in Southern’s ability to manage customer growth, communications, and evolving energy needs across its multi-state footprint. We’ll now examine how this wave of analyst upgrades, reflecting...
